text:
1. Determine the time difference: US/Hawaii is UTC - 10, and Australia/Sydney is UTC + 10. So the time difference is (+10) - (-10) = 20 hours.
2. Add the time difference to 9 PM (21:00): 21:00 + 20 hours = 17:00 (next - day due to wrap - around).
3. Since we cross a day boundary, the date becomes September 24, 1118.
FINAL_ANSWER: 17:00 on September 24, 1118
